title: alcea sulphurea
intro: Alcea sulphurea, also known as the sulphur marigold or sulphur flower, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Alcea sulphurea include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and aid in the treatment of coughs and colds. Alcea sulphurea can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used topically in the form of salves and ointments.
